zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair於1400年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親John de Dalrymple62歲，母親Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure64歲。他於1423年與Agnes Kennedy在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1437年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾達爾普爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair于1400年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲John de Dalrymple62岁，母亲Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure64岁。他于1423年与Agnes Kennedy在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1437年在苏格兰艾斯爾達爾普爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dalrymple,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Ayrshire, named with Gaelic dail ‘field, meadow’ + an unexplained second element.
History: The Dalrymple family which held the earldom of Stair can be traced to William de Dalrymple, who in 1429 acquired the estate of Stair in Kyle, Ayrshire.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair was born in 1400, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John de Dalrymple, was 62 and his mother, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, was 64. He married Agnes Kennedy in 1423, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1437, in Dalrymple, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 38.

Il a épousé Agnes Kennedy en 1423, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1437, à Dalrymple, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair(이)가 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Dalrymple(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure(은)는 64세였다. 그는 1423년 스컷랜드에서 Agnes Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1437년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 다리플에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.
